# Membership Tiers

There are three tiers: Silver from zero points, Gold after five thousand lifetime points, and Platinum after twenty thousand lifetime points. Gold members get free expedited delivery on every order, while Platinum members add a dedicated support line and early access to seasonal sales. Tier status is reviewed annually and a member who has not earned points in the prior twelve months drops one tier.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#membership-tiers]
